headline: How The Everest Group (EG) Investment Narrative Is Shifting As Analyst Targets Reposition
summary: Everest Group's updated fair value estimate has shifted slightly from US$364.53 to US$362.87, a small change that still matters if you are tracking where the stock might be fully priced. Across Wall Street, recent target hikes into the mid to high US$300s and cuts of double digit dollar amounts show how differently analysts are weighing valuation, execution risks, and the insurance cycle. As you read on, you will see how to follow this evolving narrative and put these shifting targets into...
